---
theme-settings:
  theme: default
  barposition: top
  barcolor: "#FF0000"
  footer-left: "Warm start test footer"

survey-settings:
  mode: preview
  show-previous: false
  use-cookies: false
  auto-scroll: false
  rate-survey: false
  system-language: en
  highlight-unanswered: true
  highlight-color: blue
  capture-metadata: true
  all-required: false
---

```{r}
library(surveydown)
```

--- page1

# Warm Start Test

This app is launched twice by the test: once cold (full render) and once
with a warm `_survey/` cache, verifying that the cached startup path
serves the same progress bar color, footer, and a working survey.

```{r}
sd_question(
  type  = 'mc',
  id    = 'fruit',
  label = "Favorite fruit?",
  option = c(
    'Apple'  = 'apple',
    'Banana' = 'banana'
  )
)
```

--- end

## End of the warm start test survey.

```{r}
sd_close()
```
